Meta.Documentation: A TestMeasure specifies a measure of a specific aspect of a product, service, or resource test, such as lost packets or connectivity status
The number of digits of accuracy captured for associated Metrics format: float
The date and time that the metric was captured format: date-time
The method used to capture the Metrics (This may be replaced by a set of entities similar to the Performance Monitoring Ref)
Hyperlink to access a metric for detail information
The unit of measure for the metric values, such as meters, cubic yards, kilograms [ISO 1000].
A list of rules that were violated in this test measure
When sub-classing, this defines the super-class
A URI to a JSON-Schema file that defines additional attributes and relationships format: uri
When sub-classing, this defines the sub-class Extensible name
